export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.13+11
export NODE_ENV=production
export WATCHMAN_ENABLED=false
export REACT_NATIVE_WATCHMAN=false
# Also disable watchman via metro config
export METRO_DISABLE_WATCHMAN=1

echo "=== RESTARTING GRADLE BUILD WITH WATCHMAN DISABLED ==="
nohup ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon -x lintVitalAnalyzeRelease -x lintVitalRelease --stacktrace > /tmp/gradle-build2.log 2>&1 &
GRADLE_PID=$!
echo "Gradle build restarted, PID: $GRADLE_PID"
echo $GRADLE_PID > /tmp/gradle-pid.txt
sleep 5
echo ""
echo "=== INITIAL LOG ==="
head -10 /tmp/gradle-build2.log 2>/dev/null"}
